title: Workforms attached to item?
excerpt:
I want to use a Workform as response form and send the link in an email.  That part works fine, but is there a way to link the response form to a particular line item instead of Monday creating a new line item? 
For exam…

posts.author: KellyArco (Kelly Arco)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to use a Workform as response form and send the link in an email. That part works fine, but is there a way to link the response form to a particular line item instead of Monday creating a new line item?

For example, I’m sending out an email with a link to a customer complaint to the local system, as well as a link to the created response form. That all works well, but when the response form is submitted, it is treated as a new line item, when I would prefer it be treated as an attachment to the original complaint/line item.

Seems simple enough, but I have not been able to figure it out.

Thanks!

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Kelly,

Currently, Workforms does not support updating current items on the board. For this, I recommend using the SuperForm app.

You can install the app by accessing the monday Marketplace and searching for SuperForm. Alternatively, you can use this link: SuperForm.

With this app, you can seamlessly update new and existing items, support additional columns, such as connected boards, mirror, formula and subitems, and create more filtering conditions in an easy-to-use package.

Screenshot 2024-08-05 195633828×414 51.4 KB

Please take a look at the app functionalities and let me know if this is what you are looking for.

Best,
Shiro
